/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/metronome_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmetronome_plugin.so -o libmetronome_plugin.so CMakeFiles/metronome_plugin.dir/metronome_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metronome_plugin.dir/metronome.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metronome_plugin.dir/metronome_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
